ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the repository was created */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary programming language of the repository */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the repository is released */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Whether the repository is private or public */,
  "default_branch" TEXT /* Default branch of the repository */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity in the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "contributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "contributions" INTEGER /* Number of contributions made by the contributor */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username of the contributor */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the contributor joined the organization */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity by the contributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the pull request belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the pull request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pull request (open, closed, merged) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the pull request was created */,
  "closed_date" TEXT /* Date when the pull request was closed */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the pull request */,
  "merged_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who merged the pull request */,
  "labels" TEXT /* JSON array of labels associated with the pull request */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the pull request */,
  "review_comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of review comments on the pull request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_merged_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("merged_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the issue belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (open, closed) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was created */,
  "closed_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was closed */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the issue */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "labels" TEXT /* JSON array of labels associated with the issue */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the commit belongs to */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who made the commit */,
  "message" TEXT /* Commit message */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date when the commit was made */,
  "commit_url" TEXT /* URL of the commit on GitHub */,
  "files_changed" INTEGER /* Number of files changed in the commit */,
  "additions" INTEGER /* Number of lines added in the commit */,
  "deletions" INTEGER /* Number of lines deleted in the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stargazers" (
  "stargazer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each star event */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository starred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who starred the repository */,
  "starred_date" TEXT /* Date when the repository was starred */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username of the stargazer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stargazer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stargazers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stargazers_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined GitHub */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
